A minor '''engagement''' between the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] took place near [[Vortex/Legends|Vortex]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], shortly before the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1stm}}
